sentences.arabic: الْأَخْلَاقُ الْحَسَنَةُ هِيَ جُزْءٌ كَبِيرٌ مِنَ الْإِيمَانِ.
sentences.translation: Lijep ahkak je veliki dio imana.
sentences.translationEn: Good manners are a large part of faith.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللهِ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ: «إِنَّ مِنْ خِيَارِكُمْ أَحْسَنَكُمْ أَخْلَاقًا» [رَوَاهُ الْبُخَارِيُّ فِي كِتَابِ الْأَدَبِ].
sentences.translation: Allahov Poslanik, s.a.v.s., je rekao: "Najbolji od vas su oni koji imaju najljepši ahkak" [Bilježi Buhari u Knjizi o adabu].
sentences.translationEn: The Messenger of Allah (peace be upon him) said: "The best among you are those with the best manners" [Narrated by al-Bukhari in the Book of Manners].

sentences.arabic: الْمُسْلِمُ اللَّطِيفُ يُحِبُّهُ النَّاسُ وَيَرْضَى عَنْهُ رَبُّهُ.
sentences.translation: Blagog muslimana ljudi vole i njegov Gospodar je zadovoljan njime.
sentences.translationEn: People love a kind Muslim, and his Lord is pleased with him.

sentences.arabic: الصِّدْقُ وَالْأَمَانَةُ وَالْكَرَمُ مِنْ صِفَاتِ الْمُؤْمِنِ الْحَقِيقِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Istinoljubivost, povjerljivost i plemenitost su osobine pravog vjernika.
sentences.translationEn: Honesty, trustworthiness, and generosity are qualities of a true believer.

sentences.arabic: نَحْنُ نَتَعَلَّمُ هَذِهِ الْآدَابَ لِنَعِيشَ فِي سَلَامٍ وَمَحَبَّةٍ.
sentences.translation: Mi učimo ove adabe kako bismo živjeli u miru i ljubavi.
sentences.translationEn: We learn these manners to live in peace and love.
